rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught live, flipped it, did it anyway. That's a round won on points AND style. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral Friday, changed in the men's change room — poncho still on, but the choice was made and that counts. Round lost: Apollo ring and necklace avoided at work — pool nerves, ring size, 'reads as obviously gay.' Named it clearly though, which is more than last week's Matt would've done.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers now, loud with his people — especially anyone who might actually clock what he's wearing.
